lines.lyrics: The heavens came open, you fell from the sky
Can I come see you once in a while?
Falling for the magic in your devilish eyes
On the very first day you taught me to fly
When I'm around you it's easiest to see
That you should be the one with me
This is a spell that has never worn off
I surrender my power and open the vault
And you can take anything that you want
There's an endless stream of you in my thoughts
When I'm around you it's easiest to see
That you should be the one for me
All the conclusions fall out of mind
A glance of the pendulum swinging out of time
It's a rhythmatic speed to love's endless flow
That's trapped me in space where my heart, my heart is aglow
Everyone says that I'm just mystified
That happened the moment you stepped in my life
Forever with you is all that I need
Together the years will melt in the sea
